creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Release candidate 1, at the time of writing, <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.2R/> hardware information: 

- <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/14.2R/hardware/#wlan> 
  currently lacks a subsection for iwm(4)

- does list three types of 7260 under iwlwifi 👍

----

Side note, <https://old.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/1h05x48/-/>: 

> Intel® Wireless 7260
